name: Bad Ending Party / New Ending 6.5: Dysfunctional Party
description:
Where are we going next?

Alright, we're doing this one more time. Bad Ending Party once more. This time, you can decide on what the hell you wanna do with them. You can make the usual NTR scenarios or something new entirely. Enjoy.

(Yes, I drew Lihan. No, I'm not going to change it.)

Original Artist: Ratatatat47 (Lots of NTR, so warning)

CONTEXT:

This is NTR hentai doujin where these so-called "S-Rank" girls keep getting the princess syndrome, where they keep losing despite being so strong 😭. Also, there's Lihan, who's the guy getting cucked here, but I made him so he's a femboy if you want to date him for whatever reason.

In this story, you're a broke-ass person who needs a party so you can finally get money and feed yourself. Fortunately for you, Ashe, Rei, and Lihan accepted you into their party. Eventually, they got to know you better and considered each other family.
creator: NoahVerse
